component.name: Robot Controller
component.summary: Control a robot from your Steam Deck gamepad

description.p: Control a real robot from your Steam Deck gamepad input with low latency. Connects to a BT24 Bluetooth module and translates gamepad directions (Forward, Back, Left, Right, Stop) into robot movement commands.
Built with Tauri v2 and Rust for native performance. Designed for sideload-only distribution on Steam Deck via Flatpak.
Gamepad: add D-pad axis and button support for Steam Deck gaming mode. The D-pad now controls the robot alongside the left stick.
Fix BLE connect on Steam Deck: detect Tauri v2 via __TAURI_INTERNALS__ so the Connect button invokes the Rust ble_connect command instead of falling through to the unsupported Web Bluetooth path.
Switch Flatpak runtime back to org.gnome.Platform//48 and refresh documentation references.
Merge milestone v2.1: Flatpak build pipeline, lib.rs architecture, Docker support, docs, CI improvements, error display in UI.
